plugins.name: tech-lead
plugins.description: Tech-lead lifecycle skills: weekly meeting agenda + meeting summary, tracer-bullet debugging pattern (BE+FE), and a two-pass codebase comparison report (default file tools vs ast-graph).

plugins.name: dev-agent
plugins.description: Orchestrator for taking a development task through 9 phases — grooming → requirements → architecture → task plan → tech spec → tests → implementation → e2e → patch — with light reviewer gates between AI phases. Stack-agnostic.
